description: Get FlowLogs records from new S3 Parquet objects based on notifications
name: Fetch new FlowLogs Parquet records on S3

queue_name.description: The name of the SQS queue that received the notifications of the creation of S3 objects

chunk_size.description: The size of chunks for the batch processing

intake_key.description: Intake key to use when sending events

prefix_filter.description: If set, only S3 objects whose key starts with this prefix will be processed. Use this when the S3 bucket contains multiple log types and you want to collect only specific ones
